test.name: Propose a new plan after the first plan is complete
test.description: The first plan for q_001 (census + death certificate) is completed but q_001 isn't yet resolved — proof_summary is at `probable`, not `proved`. The skill should propose a NEW plan with the next-best record types, not declare the question done.

input.user_message: Create the next research plan for the parentage question.

additional_criteria: Should create a new plan (`pl_003`, not modify the completed `pl_002`) and link it to q_001

Plan items should propose at least one substantive next source — probate, post-1860 censuses, FAN research, naturalization, immigration records — and explain in `rationale` why each is expected to advance q_001
Each new plan item should have `sequence` numbered consistently, `status: "planned"` (not `in_progress`), and `fallback_for: null` unless a fallback chain is being set up
